text:
(E1P) Reduced Social Interaction CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - loss of interest - reduced social interaction. 0 = Indicator not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 = Indicator of this type exhibited daily or almost daily (6, 7 days a week), (-) = Unknown, (sp) = Blank.
174 E2 E2_MOOD_PERSIST (E2) Mood Persistance CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: mood persistance. 0 = No Mood Indicators; 1
